summary: Frontend-only e2e testing of AskTaaza React app completed. All 5 MVP features (Question Bank, Daily Review, Study Plan, Practice, Progress) plus auth (Google + LinkedIn local stub), session persistence, sidebar navigation, active plan banner, mobile drawer, and toasts work end-to-end with mocked data. No backend involved.
critical_code_review_comments: QuestionBank.jsx: CompanyBadge renders with data-testid='company-badge-<id>' inside BOTH the COMPANY filter pills and the question-card open-blueprint button. Two elements share the same testid pattern. Selector [data-testid^='company-badge-'] is therefore ambiguous (17 matches: 5 in filters + 12 in cards). The wrapper button uses [data-testid='open-blueprint-<company>'] which is reliable. Recommend either (a) suppress data-testid on CompanyBadge when used decoratively inside filter pills, or (b) prefix filter-side badges differently (e.g., filter-badge-<id>). Functional behavior is correct — only test-selector ergonomics affected.
auth.js: 900ms artificial delay in signInWithProvider is fine for demo but spec mentions OAuth — when wiring Supabase later, remove the setTimeout shim entirely.

appState.js: state is initialized from localStorage but DEFAULT_STATE.dueToday=12 is spread-merged on top of saved values via {...DEFAULT_STATE, ...saved}, so a saved smaller dueToday correctly overrides — verified working. No bug, just noting fragile merge pattern if new defaults are added.
All interactive elements have data-testid coverage; AAA accessible (sign-in, nav, ratings, filters, modal, charts widgets). No console errors during full e2e run.
test_credentials: Local stub auth — click [data-testid=signin-google] (Aarav Mehta) or [data-testid=signin-linkedin] (Priya Sharma). No password. Session in localStorage key 'asktaaza_session_v1'.
seed_data_creation: None — all data is mocked in /app/frontend/src/lib/mockData.js. Test pre-injected a session into localStorage to bypass redirect when starting from /app/* routes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app. Backend FastAPI/MongoDB exist but unused. To test protected routes directly, seed localStorage: localStorage.setItem('asktaaza_session_v1', JSON.stringify({user:{id:'usr_g_001',provider:'google',name:'Aarav Mehta',email:'aarav.mehta@gmail.com',avatarInitials:'AM'},signedInAt:new Date().toISOString()})). When testing blueprint modal, click [data-testid^='open-blueprint-'] (unambiguous) not [data-testid^='company-badge-'] (matches filter pills + cards). DailyReview session-complete requires rating 8 consecutive cards. Practice + StudyPlan have 1.5s mocked AI delays — wait ~1.8s after clicking analyze-jd / submit-answer. use-freeze toast: 'Freeze applied. Your streak is safe today.'
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. One minor selector-ambiguity note (CompanyBadge testid used both in filter sidebar and inside question cards); does not impact end-user functionality.
